project.name: reelme
project.tagline: Your README, but as a video.
project.problem: OSS projects go unnoticed because text READMEs don't grab attention.

scenes.headline: Your README doesn't grab attention.
scenes.subtext: Most people skim past walls of text.
scenes.caption: Developers judge a project in seconds.

scenes.headline: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
items: Asks only what it can't infer
Works with any language or framework
scenes.caption: Zero config. Full output.

after.label: With reelme
after.content:
▶  30-second animated video
   showing exactly what it does,

scenes.caption: Ships as a shareable MP4 or GIF.

Star it, share it, ship it.
